# Pennyverse

> Smart savings and financial wellness app — track expenses, build savings goal vaults, and get AI-powered financial coaching.

Pennyverse helps users save daily, lock money into goal vaults, track spending by category, and get personalized AI insights.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Wallet balance, daily savings streak, and spending overview.
- [Sign in](/auth): Log in or create a Pennyverse account.
